Alongside this acquisition push, Vertiv is advancing production-grade digital twin capabilities for AI factories and reporting expanding operating margins, underscoring...

news.headline: Vertiv Introduces First Converged Physical Infrastructure Digital Twin for NVIDIA Omniverse DSX
news.summary: Vertiv (NYSE: VRT), a global leader in critical digital infrastructure, today announced progress on a production-grade digital twin capability for Vertiv™ SmartRun integrated in the NVIDIA Omniverse DSX Blueprint, advancing the company's roadmap to make AI factory infrastructure more configurable, repeatable, and simulation-ready.
